name: Spinach Fettucine with Ginger Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Chicken breast, boneless and skinless
1 medium Yellow squash, trimmed and cut into matchsticks
1 medium Red bell pepper, trimmed and cut into strips
1 large Leek, white part only, trimmed and cut into half rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine all marinade/dressing ingredients in a blender and mix thoroughly at low speed.
3. Place the chicken in a shallow baking dish. Pour half of the mixture from the blender over the poultry, reserving the remainder. Cover and refrigerate the chicken for 20 minutes.
4. Bring a large pot of water to boil over high heat. Add the fettuccine and cook for 8 to 12 minutes, until desired doneness.
5. Remove the chicken from the refrigerator. Uncover the baking dish and transfer it to the oven. Bake for 15 minutes, until the meat is no longer pink and juices run clear.
6. When the pasta is cooked, remove the pot from heat. Drain the fettuccine and return it to the pot. Stir in the chicken stock and keep mixture warm over lowest heat setting.
7. Pour the cooking juices from the chicken into a saute pan. Add the squash, bell pepper, leek, broccoli, and mushrooms. Saute for about 3 minutes, just until vegetables begin to wilt.
8. Transfer pasta with vegetables to a serving bowl. Shred the chicken on top. Add reserved dressing and toss. Garnish with snipped chives.
